entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop Cicer arietinum Linn. being studied for resistance to H. armigera

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A moth pest that affects chickpea crops

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where the pest is deterred from the host plant

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to resist infestation by H. armigera

entities.name: OVIPOSITION PREFERENCE
entities.description: The tendency of H. armigera moths to lay eggs on specific chickpea genotypes

entities.name: NO CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A laboratory test condition where the moth has only one genotype option for oviposition

entities.name: DUAL-CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A laboratory test condition where the moth chooses between two genotypes for oviposition

entities.name: MULTI-CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A laboratory test condition where the moth chooses among multiple genotypes for oviposition

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where the study was conducted

entities.name: DESI TYPE GENOTYPES
entities.description: A group of chickpea genotypes including ICC 12475, ICC 12476, ICC 12477, ICC 12478, ICC 12479, ICC 12490 and ICC 14876

entities.name: KABULI TYPE GENOTYPES
entities.description: A group of chickpea genotypes including ICC 12491, ICC 12493, ICC 12494, ICC 12495, ICC 12968, ICC 4973 and ICC 4962

entities.name: CHICKPEA IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing improved chickpea varieties
